transcript: Speaker A: भाई, नेक्स्ट स्टॉप कितने देर में आएगी? [Brother, how long until the next stop?] Speaker B: I think it will take another 45 minutes. Speaker A: 45 minutes? मुझे बहुत ज़ोर से भूख लगी है। [45 minutes? I am very hungry.] Speaker B: Yeah, I'm quite hungry too. I need to get something to eat at the next stop. Speaker A: भाई, तू इतनी अच्छी इंग्लिश कैसे बोलता है? मैंने भी बहुत सारे बुक्स पढ़के इंग्लिश सीखने की कोशिश की, पर कभी फ्लूएंट इंग्लिश बोल ही नहीं पाता हूँ। [Brother, how do you speak such good English? I also tried learning English by reading many books, but I can never speak fluent English.] Speaker B: बुक्स पढ़ने से कभी सीखेगा भी नहीं। MySivi ऐप इंस्टॉल कर ले। [You will never learn just by reading books. Install the MySivi app.] Speaker A: MySivi ऐप? वो क्या है? [MySivi app? What is that?] Speaker B: MySivi ऐप में एक AI टीचर है जिसके साथ तुम बिना जजमेंट के इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस कर सकते हो। और गलतियाँ करो तो AI तुरंत करेक्ट भी कर देती है। [In the MySivi app, there is an AI teacher with whom you can practice English without judgment. And if you make mistakes, the AI corrects them instantly.] Speaker A: पर मुझे टाइम भी कहाँ मिलता है? [But where do I even get the time?] Speaker B: ज़्यादा टाइम की ज़रूरत नहीं है। मैं बस दिन का 10-15 मिनट प्रैक्टिस करता हूँ, एंड माय इंग्लिश इस गेटिंग बेटर एंड बेटर एवरी सिंगल डे। [You don't need much time. I just practice 10-15 minutes a day, and my English is getting better and better every single day.] Speaker A: अच्छा बढ़िया! पर ये ऐप तो महंगा होगा ना? [Oh great! But this app must be expensive, right?] Speaker B: बिल्कुल नहीं। मैंने बस ₹1 में शुरू किया था, तो तुम भी कर सकते हो। [Not at all. I started for just 1 rupee, so you can too.] Speaker A: फिर मैं अभी के अभी MySivi ऐप इंस्टॉल करता हूँ। [Then I will install the MySivi app right away.] Voiceover: इंस्टॉल नाउ पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on install now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: Bhai [Brother] Next Stop Kitne [How long until next stop] Der Me Aayegi [will it take] I Think It Will Take Another 45 Minutes Mujhe Bahut Joor [I am very] Se Bhuk Lagi Hai [hungry] Yeah I'm Quite Hungry Too I Need To Get Something To Eat At The Next Stop Bhai [Brother] Tu Itni Aachi [How do you speak] English Kaise [such good] Bolta Hai [English] Maine Bhi Bahut [I also tried] Saare Books Padh [reading many books] Ke English Seekhne [to learn English] Ki Kosis Ki Par [but] Kabhi Fluent [never fluent] English Bol Hi [could speak] Nahi Pata Hu [English] Books Padhne [By reading books] Se Kabhi Seekhega [you will never learn] Bhi Nahi [either] MySivi App Install Kar Le [Install MySivi App] MySivi App Wo [MySivi App, what] Kya Hai Mysivi [is that MySivi] MySivi App Me [In MySivi App] Ek Ai Teacher [there is an AI teacher] Hai Jiske Sath [with whom] Tum Bina Judgement [you without judgment] Ke English Practice [can practice English] Kar Sakte Ho Aur Galtiyan [And mistakes] Karo To Ai [if you make, AI] Turant Correct [instantly corrects] Bhi Kar Deti Hai Par Mujhe [But I] Time Bhi Kahan [where do I get time] Milta Hai Zyada Time [Much time] Ki Zaroorat Nahi [is not needed] Hai Main Bas [I just] Din Ka 10-15 [10-15 minutes of the day] Min Practice [practice] Karta Hu And Your English Will Get Better Better Every Single Day Aacha [Oh] Badiya [Great] Par Ye App [But this app] To Mehnga [must be expensive] Hoga Na Bilkul Nahi [Not at all] Maine Sirf [I just] 1 Rupye Me [in 1 rupee] Shuru Kiya [started] Tha Tum Bhi Kar [You can also] Sakte Ho [do it] Phir Main Abhi [Then I right now] Ke Abhi Mysivi [will install MySivi] App Install Karta [app] Hu MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: Two friends on a bus discuss learning English. One explains how he improved his fluency using the MySivi app's AI teacher, which corrects mistakes instantly and requires only 10-15 minutes daily. The ad ends with a call to action to download the app for just 1 rupee.
